issues_resolved: Phase 3 open question 1 (series count correctness): RESOLVED — keep-at-3 ratified; per-series figure lists reassigned with no overlap (S901 = Fig 9.1, 9.2, 9.16).

issues_resolved: Phase 3 open question 1 (series count + figure-list overflow): RESOLVED — S903 figure list trimmed from 11 to 3 (Fig 9.8, 9.12, 9.19 = the actual wage-profit curves). Overlapping figures 9.6, 9.7, 9.13, 9.14, 9.15, 9.18 reassigned to S902; Fig 9.16 reassigned to S901.

Phase 3 open question 3 (1947 R > 1): not actually an issue — R = 1/lambda_max(KT) = 1.088 simply means profit rates up to 108.8% are mathematically admissible in 1947's geometry; matches Shaikh's plotted Fig 9.19 x-axis range. Confirmed.
Source reachability: BEA + PWT 7.1 release archive + PWT root all 200 OK 2026-05-18 — no substitution needed for book-period replication.

PWT 7.1 -> PWT 10.01 growth-rate splice strategy documented but not yet operationalized in a loader.
